title: MultiTACRED: Multilingual TAC Relation Extraction
description: Multilingual version of the TACRED relation extraction dataset in 12 languages. Annotators identify subject/object entities and classify relations from 41 TAC relation types, with additional translation quality assessment.
citation:
@inproceedings{hennig-etal-2023-multitacred,

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 61st Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 1: Long Papers)",
    month = jul,
    year = "2023",
